test.command: ssh -J root@wittymantis.netbird.selfhosted root@192.168.1.189 'cd /root/mi50grad && PYTHONPATH=/root/mi50grad python3 tests/test_<testfile>.py'
test.detail: All key M2 test files pass: test_prefill_gemm_dot2.py (ALL TESTS PASSED), test_int4_gemv_optimize.py (All INT4 GEMV optimization tests PASSED), test_rope_v2.py (ALL TESTS PASSED), test_m2_decode.py (8/8 passed), test_m2_prefill.py (10/10 passed), test_m1m2_combined.py (9/9 passed). Non-regression: test_gemm_fp16.py (PASS), test_gemv_int4.py (PASS), test_flash_attn.py (PASS), test_elementwise.py (PASS).

typecheck.command: N/A - Python project without type annotations / mypy setup
typecheck.detail: No typecheck step defined in services.yaml. Python files run successfully with Python 3.12 on LXC.

lint.command: N/A - no lint step defined in services.yaml
lint.detail: No lint step defined in .factory/services.yaml. Code quality reviewed manually.

appliedUpdates.description: architecture.md already contained comprehensive knowledge about all M2 optimizations, added by workers during implementation. No additional library updates required — all sharedStateObservations from reviews were already documented.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: In kernel-optimization-worker skill, add note to TDD step: For optimization-only features where a kernel already exists and tests pass from the start, TDD means writing the benchmark first and capturing baseline numbers BEFORE optimizing. The 'failing test' is the performance test that doesn't yet meet the target TFLOPS/bandwidth.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m2-int4-gemv-optimize worker noted that the TDD approach doesn't map cleanly to optimization-only work — existing kernels already pass tests from day 1.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note: When the scrutiny-feature-reviewer droid fails with model errors, the scrutiny-validator should perform the reviews inline by reading source code and handoff files directly. Record this in the synthesis under reviewsSummary as self-reviewed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: scrutiny-feature-reviewer subagents all failed with 'Invalid model: custom:CCS-sonnet' error. Reviews were conducted inline by reading source code and handoffs.

rejectedObservations.observation: Suggest adding to validation-contract.md: 3e-3 threshold for VAL-GEMM-002 for K>=4096
rejectedObservations.reason: Validation contract updates are orchestrator decisions, not library/services decisions. Included in suggestedGuidanceUpdates instead.

featureReviews.keyFinding: 18.57 TFLOPS (69.3% peak) vs 13.27 TFLOPS baseline. __builtin_amdgcn_fdot2 + XOR-swizzled LDS + amdgpu_flat_work_group_size(256,256). All Qwen shapes correct at 3e-3 threshold.

v3_t16 1.24x faster than v2_fused for N=4096 (29.5 vs 36.7 us). ubfe nibble extraction + pow2 shift applied to v2 and v3. v3_t16 wired as engine default for non-residual GEMV. DPP explored but slower.
HIP RoPE exact match vs CPU reference (max_err=0.000000). More accurate than assembly. Multi-token support (assembly was broken for multi-token). Engine wired correctly.
27 integration tests pass across 3 files. VAL-CROSS-002/003/006/004/005/007 all satisfied. Non-regression confirmed for all pre-existing kernel tests.

reviewNote: scrutiny-feature-reviewer subagents failed due to model configuration error (custom:CCS-sonnet not available). Reviews were conducted inline by the scrutiny-validator reading source code, handoff files, and live test output.
